results.rendered_html:
māṃsala (von māṃsa) adj. gaṇa sidhmādi zu  P. 5,2,97 .  VOP. 7,32. fg. 
1〉 fleischig  AK. 2,6,1,44 .  H. 449 .  SUŚR. 1,125,2 . 326,11 . 359,13 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 68,17 . 26 . 28 . 51 . 59 .  DAŚAK. 154,2 . rakta˚ aus Fleisch und Blut bestehend  SUŚR. 1,234,9 .
— 2〉 kräftig, stark (von einem Tone u. s. w.): dhvaniśca māṅgalyamṛdaṅgamāṃsalaḥ  UTTARARĀMAC. 114,3 . ojaḥ samāsabhūyastvaṃ māṃsalaṃ padaḍambaram  KĀVYACANDRIKĀ _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
māṃsala a. [māṃsa-lac; cf. aṃsala]
1 Fleshy.
2 Muscular, lusty, brawny  U. 1. 
3 Fat, strong, powerful; śākhāḥ śataṃ māṃsalāḥ  Bv. 1. 34. 
4 Deep (as sound); dhvaniśca māṃgalyamṛdaṃgamāṃsalaḥ  U. 6. 25 ; pratibhinnapuṣkarāvartakattanitamāṃsalo vāṅnirgheṣa  Mv. 2. 
5 Increased in bulk or quantity;  Māl. 9. 13. 
6 Pulpy (as fruit).
7 Dense, thick.
